title: RiskConfig
description: Portfolio risk limits and kill switch configuration for Claw Mafia Finance.

max_daily_var_pct.description: Maximum daily portfolio VaR as fraction of equity (e.g. 0.012 = 1.2%). Kill switch above this.

max_drawdown_pct.description: Maximum portfolio drawdown as fraction of equity (e.g. 0.08 = 8%). Kill switch above this.

max_net_delta_pct.description: Maximum net delta exposure as fraction of equity (e.g. 0.50 = 50%).

max_gross_notional_pct.description: Maximum gross notional exposure as fraction of equity (e.g. 1.5 = 150%).

max_drawdown_pct.description: Maximum per-strategy drawdown as fraction of equity. Alert above this.

max_allocation_pct.description: Maximum allocation per strategy as fraction of equity (e.g. 0.30 = 30%).

max_position_notional_pct.description: Maximum notional per position as fraction of equity (e.g. 0.15 = 15%).

max_sector_weight_pct.description: Maximum exposure to any single sector as fraction of equity (e.g. 0.40 = 40%).

iv_spike_multiplier.description: Kill switch trigger: current IV > this multiple of 20-day average IV (e.g. 2.0 = 2x).

iv_alert_multiplier.description: Alert threshold: current IV > this multiple of 20-day average (e.g. 1.5 = 1.5x).

correlation_breach_threshold.description: Reject/reduce allocation when pairwise correlation exceeds this value (e.g. 0.9).

active.description: Whether the kill switch is currently active (halts new paper orders).

reason.description: Human-readable reason the kill switch was triggered.

triggered_at.description: ISO timestamp when the kill switch was triggered.

auto_resume_after_hours.description: Automatically clear kill switch after this many hours (0 = manual only).
